header.content:
# Network NCM & Compliance
Configuration-compliance posture for the managed network estate — evaluated by Ansible against the **ISO/IEC 27001:2022** baseline and shipped to Dynatrace as structured evidence. Tiles group by **role / site / control**, never by device serial, so nothing orphans on a hardware swap. Source: `log.source == "ansible-compliance"`.

kpi_devices.title: Devices evaluated
kpi_devices.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | summarize devices = count() | fields devices

kpi_compliance_pct.title: Compliance %
kpi_compliance_pct.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | summarize compliant = countIf(toLong(compliance.failed_count) == 0), total = count() | fieldsAdd compliancePercent = round(100.0 * compliant / total, decimals: 1) | fields compliancePercent

kpi_drift.title: Devices in drift
kpi_drift.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | summarize inDrift = countIf(toLong(compliance.failed_count) > 0) | fields inDrift

kpi_failures.title: Open control failures
kpi_failures.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | summarize controlFailures = sum(toLong(compliance.failed_count)) | fields controlFailures

status_table.title: Current compliance status by device
status_table.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | fieldsAdd status = if(toLong(compliance.failed_count) > 0, "DRIFT", else: "COMPLIANT") | fields device.name, net_role, net_site, net_class, device.serial, status, failed = toLong(compliance.failed_count), lastEvaluated = timestamp | sort failed desc

iso_violations.title: ISO 27001 control violations (Annex A)
iso_violations.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | expand ctrl = compliance.controls | parse ctrl, "JSON:c" | fieldsAdd result = c[result], control = concat(c[iso_control], " — ", c[title]) | filter result == "FAIL" | summarize violations = count(), by: {control} | sort violations desc

control_pivot.title: Compliance matrix — all 20 controls per device (✓ pass / ✗ fail / — n/a for role)
control_pivot.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | expand ctrl = compliance.controls | parse ctrl, "JSON:c" | fieldsAdd ck = c[control_key], res = if(c[result] == "PASS", "✓", else: "✗") | summarize `A.8.20 no-telnet` = takeMax(if(ck == "no_telnet", res, else: "—")), `A.8.20 vty-acl` = takeMax(if(ck == "vty_access_class", res, else: "—")), `A.8.20 no-http` = takeMax(if(ck == "no_http_server", res, else: "—")), `A.8.20 port-sec` = takeMax(if(ck == "port_security", res, else: "—")), `A.8.22 no-srcroute` = takeMax(if(ck == "no_source_route", res, else: "—")), `A.8.22 deny-all` = takeMax(if(ck == "default_deny_ruleset", res, else: "—")), `A.8.5 ssh-v2` = takeMax(if(ck == "ssh_v2_only", res, else: "—")), `A.8.5 enable-secret` = takeMax(if(ck == "enable_secret", res, else: "—")), `A.8.2 aaa` = takeMax(if(ck == "aaa_enabled", res, else: "—")), `A.8.2 exec-timeout` = takeMax(if(ck == "exec_timeout", res, else: "—")), `A.5.15 banner` = takeMax(if(ck == "login_banner", res, else: "—")), `A.8.24 pw-encrypt` = takeMax(if(ck == "password_encryption", res, else: "—")), `A.8.24 bgp-md5` = takeMax(if(ck == "bgp_md5_auth", res, else: "—")), `A.8.24 ntp-auth` = takeMax(if(ck == "ntp_auth", res, else: "—")), `A.8.9 snmpv3` = takeMax(if(ck == "snmp_not_default_community", res, else: "—")), `A.8.13 archive` = takeMax(if(ck == "config_archive", res, else: "—")), `A.8.15 logging` = takeMax(if(ck == "logging_host_set", res, else: "—")), `A.8.16 log-sev` = takeMax(if(ck == "logging_trap_severity", res, else: "—")), `A.8.17 ntp` = takeMax(if(ck == "ntp_configured", res, else: "—")), `A.8.23 web-filter` = takeMax(if(ck == "web_filtering", res, else: "—")), by: {device = device.name, net_role, net_site} | sort net_role asc, device asc

control_matrix.title: Compliance heatmap — device × ISO control (green pass / red fail)
control_matrix.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | expand ctrl = compliance.controls | parse ctrl, "JSON:c" | fieldsAdd status = if(c[result] == "PASS", 1, else: 0) | summarize compliant = max(status), by: {device = device.name, control = c[iso_control]}

all_controls.title: All controls — every device × requirement (✓/✗, scales to any control count)
all_controls.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | expand ctrl = compliance.controls | parse ctrl, "JSON:c" | fieldsAdd device = device.name, iso = c[iso_control], control = c[title], check = if(c[result] == "PASS", "✓ PASS", else: "✗ FAIL") | fields device, net_role, net_site, iso, control, check | sort net_role asc, device asc, iso asc

by_role.title: Control failures by role
by_role.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | summarize failed = sum(toLong(compliance.failed_count)), by: {net_role}

by_site.title: Control failures by site
by_site.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | dedup {device.name}, sort: {timestamp desc} | summarize failed = sum(toLong(compliance.failed_count)), devices = count(), by: {net_site} | sort failed desc

drift_trend.title: Compliance drift over time
drift_trend.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | makeTimeseries controlFailures = sum(toLong(compliance.failed_count)), by: {net_role}

activity.title: Recent compliance evaluations (audit trail)
activity.query: fetch logs | filter log.source == "ansible-compliance" | fieldsAdd status = if(toLong(compliance.failed_count) > 0, "DRIFT", else: "COMPLIANT") | fields timestamp, device.name, net_role, net_site, phase = compliance.phase, baseline = compliance.baseline, status, failed = toLong(compliance.failed_count) | sort timestamp desc | limit 50
